Terms.title: TERMS OF SERVICE
Terms.subtitle: Terms of Use of the Platform
Terms.s1Content:
These Terms of Use (the "Terms") govern access to and use of the FoxyPlay online platform (the "Platform").

The Operator of the Platform is:

Individual entrepreneur
Lysytsia Oleksandr
Country of registration: Ukraine
(the "Operator")

The Platform provides exclusively information and technical services.

Use of the Platform constitutes the User's full and unconditional acceptance of these Terms.
Terms.s4Title: Payments and use of crypto assets
Terms.s4Content:
Crypto assets may be used solely as a means of payment for the Platform's services and for the performance of deals between users.

The Platform:

does not manage users' crypto assets;
does not provide crypto asset custody services;
does not open user accounts or e-wallets.

Crypto assets are accepted only in connection with a specific deal.

Payments in crypto assets may be irreversible.
Terms.s5Content:
After payment is confirmed:

The Platform records payment for the deal.
The seller performs their obligations.
The buyer confirms receipt of the goods.

Payout to the seller is made after confirmation of performance of the deal or automatically upon expiry of the set period.
Terms.s10Content:
The user may submit a complaint regarding performance of a deal.

The Platform may make a final decision on the dispute.

After a payout has been completed, disputes are not accepted.

CookiePolicy.title: COOKIE POLICY
CookiePolicy.subtitle: Use of cookies on the Platform
CookiePolicy.s1Content:
Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently, remember your preferences, and provide information to the site owners.

Cookies can be "session" cookies (deleted when you close your browser) or "persistent" cookies (stored for a set period or until you delete them).
CookiePolicy.s2Intro: We use the following categories of cookies:
CookiePolicy.essentialDesc: Required for the Platform to function (e.g. authentication, session management, security). These cannot be disabled without affecting core functionality.
CookiePolicy.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors use the Platform (e.g. page views, sessions). This data is used to improve the service.
CookiePolicy.securityDesc: Support fraud prevention, protection against abuse, and secure authentication. Critical for payment and crypto transaction safety.
CookiePolicy.marketingDesc: May be used to deliver relevant ads or measure ad effectiveness. You can opt out of these.

Disclaimer.title: MARKETPLACE DISCLAIMER
Disclaimer.content:
The Platform is a technological intermediary.

The Operator is not affiliated with video game developers.

All transactions are conducted between users.

The Platform does not provide financial, legal, or investment advice. Nothing on this site should be construed as an offer or recommendation to buy or sell crypto assets or other financial products.
